If one is pla ced j ust inside the doorway of a home and a short praycr said to th e hou sehold go ds, the mag ic of th e statue protects the people who live in the house against the evil eye. Any residents of the house­ hold (includ ing famil y member s, se rvants, and slaves, but not guests) receive a +3 bonus to sav­ ing throws again st the ev il eyc, as long as the scorpion ward remains in the doorway. Melior XP Value: 2,000 GP Value: 10,000 Book of Lairs. 1st Edition Melior is a lawful good, two-handed sword +3 that causes 1 d \0+3 points of damage. It speaks the following dragon tongues; Red, Black, Green, White, Blue, and Dragon Turtle; it has speech and telepathy. Melior detects precious metals, gems, invisible objects and possesses x-ray vision (like a ring 0/ x-ray vision). Its purpose is to slay non­ human monsters. Its Intelligence and Ego are both 17. [PDF_PAGE 159 | score=1] ... ing, is a dancing sword, and drains ene rgy lev­ els. On a roll of I 1- 20 it will d rain a ll the energy levels from any being if it hits, with a roll of7-1O allowing it to drain one-half of the ene rgy levels. The energy leve ls gained from the battle are transferred to the user as Strength o f 18/00. It also adds hit points by automati­ cally rolling the pr oper die for the creature struck. Ifa wizard is hit, rollld4 and multiply the result by wizard's levels. The same is done for all other classes a nd creatures. [PDF_PAGE 170 | score=1] Tabard ofthe Mystics XPValue: 2,000 G P Value: 15,000 The Magister This garme nt is typically green wi th golden trim. having a stiff stand -up. flared collar, and may be worn over armor. Its construction is expensive (powdered gold and serpentine, for examp le, must be worked into the fibers of the clo th), diffi· cult, and known on ly to a few. Tabards a/the mystics may be worn by any class, and have the following properties: Ihey will not burn, an d all fire damage suffered by the wearer is reduced by I point per die. [PDF_PAGE 203 | score=1] - Sih'cr As with the gold dragon tooth, a silver dragon's tooth also requires one ingre­ dient from the white dragon list in order to achieve the dual immunity to cold and paralysis. Venom from a carrion crawler , giant Portuguese man-a -war, giant wasp, crystal ooze, drider, lene­ braus worm, assassin bug, fire snake, garhug, grell (a large amount), lenta­ mon, or female tiger fly is also needed. White Ice load blood, hoar fox blood, ice lizard blood, or a frost man's eye (the one covered by the patch). A fier an appropriate ingred ient is found and put into the basin, a low fire is kept burning unde r the basi n, and the tooth is allowed to steep for one hour. The wizard must then cast a l
[PDF_PAGE 215 | score=1] mand word is spoke n, the rainbow grows out of the ground and rises up into the sky. The rainbow lasts for one turn. Anyone who sleps onto the rainbow is whisked up the colored path and inlo the Plane ofYsgard. In Rav enloft : The ca talogu e works almos t as described. The sole exce ption is that the re is almost always an addit ional item required besides the money to acquire the device . Some sample items are a drop of vam pire 's blood, a feather from a wereraven, a stone from the temple of Gehenna, and so on. Ifsome money and the ilems are pla ced upon the book, the magi cal dev ice appears. The device that appears is one of the few ways to leave the Demipla ne of Raven loft. However, i
[PDF_PAGE 274 | score=1] , Lightweight * XPValue: + 10 G PVaJue: + \00 DRAOOI'I Magazine lSI For thieves, mountain climbers, fast scouts, and others on the go, these items are extremely use­ ful. Weight and encumbrance may be reduced by half (rounding down) when these weapons and armor are used instead of ordinary ones. No addi­ tional advantages are given in com bat, though they do count as magical for auack purposes against cenain monsters. Living* XPVaJue:+l,OOO GP Value: +5,000 Wild Elves Living weapons are conjured spirits that are bound into weapons by powerful magicians .
